TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Alexander Van der Bellen Aliksanta Fantipilon I 1944 miheca saka 1 folad saka 18 a romi'ad sofocen ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon, malamikomoday a tamdaw. I 2016 miheca saka 12 folad saka 4 romi'ad miliyaw a misinkiw to congtong ko Awtili, itira i sakacecay royad a mitopa pakaala to 54% to satopa maala malacontong no Awtili. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Austria anini i ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 26 a romi'ad. 1 2020 miheca saka 5 folad saka 24 romi'ad misalafii a mili'epah ato widang i kakomaenan i maci, mico'isay to sapi'ading to lifong to rikec, orasaka,macepet no tayhin. √Ėsterreich: Van der Bellen wird Bundespr√§sident. Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung. Van der Bellen gewinnt die Wahl. Wiener Zeitung. (2016-12-04). (ŚéüŚßčŚÖßŚģĻŚ≠ėś™ĒśĖľ2017-03-05). laloma'an Śģ∂Śļ≠ Pinaro no loma' ni Alisanta Fanter Peylon , O teloc no Sarawa'an no Rosiya , iraay ho ko no Horan a kasarocorocok no 'ilang1944 miheca saka 1 folad saka 18 romi'ad itini i Wiyiena no Awtili ko kahofoc ningra. I 1994 a miheca tangasa i 2012 a miheca, o miocoran no Langdaway-Centang a malakiing no Finawlan-Pikaikiaan no Kitakit . Malakakeridan no Langdaway-Centang ato citodongay to demak no kiing cingra. lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Safaw falo ko mihecaan i, pataloma' to ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon , safaw siwa ko mihecaan nira malamama' to. Ci Policiter Peyelay ko fafahi nira, nai 1943-2018 miheca 50 a mihecaan ko ka lalamod nangra, nikaorira, itini to 2015 a miheca malalikong cangra, tatosa ko fa'inayan a wawa nangra. Itiya sato i 2015 miheca saka safaw tosa a folad, pataloma' heca to toya widang nira ci Toris Semitawer , itini to i Wiyena ato Kaneytar ko aro' nangra. palatamdaw śēôŤā≤ Itini i 1966 miheca, oya nitilidan mikikiwan nira a kicaci ato ya ono sowse nira a tilid hananay hawi, pakalayap to sakakaay tata'akay a ngangan to Hakasi/Pose . I 1970 miheca itira i Yinspoluko Taikaku a malaciyawso(singsi)nipasifa' to sapili'etan a kicai. mikapot to sieciśĒŅś≤Ľ Nai tenokay no 1970 a miheca tangesa i ikor no1980 a miheca, ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon mikapotay to Siyakay-Finawlan Centang no Awtili , nikaorira, mafalic to ko hareteng pasayra i midipotay to salawacan laylay a ko demak ningra. Keriden noya pakafanaan nira a mitiliday ci Pitiro Pilec a mikomod tonini kangdaway-Centang , o kahatini kafalic tona demak i, matilid itini to misalolongan a tilid ningra. pitooran Śģóśēô Kapah ho ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon , miliyas to Fokoing-Kiwkay pakayni to sowal no poksi ira ko caay ka pakaso^lin to kawas, Nikaorira, pakaso^lin to"Ratoh anca o Mapolosi"(Botschaft oder Vision) cingra, saharaterateng han nira i, o nini ko tadaso^linay/fa^lohay a katatelekan a pitooran. Orasaka itini to 2019 a miheca mipawacay to pitooran ningra, miliyaw to a mikapot tona Fokoing-Kiwkay no Akesepow . Van der Bellen, Alexander (30 April 2019). "‚ÄěDie Botschaft des Neuen Testaments ist mir wichtig"". Sonntagsblatt . Archived from the original on 6 July 2019. Retrieved 1 May 2019. "Van der Bellen wieder in Evangelische Kirche eingetreten" . Der Standard.
S.PHON: a…ĺ…ôxan…¨~…ģ…ôr b~van …¨~…ģ…ôr b~b~v…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ôn a…ĺiksanta fantipi…ĺo~un i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ so~ufo~u ¶…ôn ¶i a…ĺisanta fant…ôr p…ôj…ĺo~un, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mi…ĺijaw a misinkiw to~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč ko~u awti…ĺi, itira i saka ¶…ô ¶aj ro~uja…¨~…ģ a mito~upa pakaa…ĺa to~u **% to~u sato~upa maa…ĺa ma…ĺa ¶o~unto~uŇč no~u awti…ĺi. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ao~u~ustria anini i ¶i a…ĺisanta fant…ôr p…ôj…ĺo~un, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. * **** mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ misa…ĺafii a mi…ĺi °…ôpańß ato~u wi…¨~…ģaŇč i kako~uma…ônan i ma ¶i, mi ¶o~u °isaj to~u sapi °a…¨~…ģiŇč to~u …ĺifo~uŇč to~u rik…ô ¶, o~urasaka,ma ¶…ôp…ôt no~u tajńßin. *st…ôrr…ôi ¶ńß: b~van …¨~…ģ…ôr b~b~v…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ôn wir…¨~…ģ b~b~vo~u~un…¨~…ģ…ôspr*si…¨~…ģ…ônt. frankfo~u~urt…ôr a…ĺ…ĺ*…ôm…ôin…ô *…ôito~u~uŇč. b~van …¨~…ģ…ôr b~b~v…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ôn *…ôwinnt …¨~…ģi…ô wańß…ĺ. wi…ôn…ôr *…ôito~u~uŇč. (***********-**-**). …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ** pinaro~u no~u …ĺo~uma ° ni a…ĺisanta fant…ôr p…ôj…ĺo~un , o~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u sarawa °an no~u ro~usija , iraaj ńßo~u ko~u no~u ńßo~uran a kasaro~u ¶o~uro~u ¶o~uk no~u °i…ĺaŇč**** mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ itini i wiji…ôna no~u awti…ĺi ko~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶ niŇčra. i **** a mińß…ô ¶a taŇčasa i **** a mińß…ô ¶a, o~u mio~u ¶o~uran no~u …ĺaŇč…¨~…ģawaj- ¶…ôntaŇč a ma…ĺakiiŇč no~u finaw…ĺan-pikaikiaan no~u kitakit . ma…ĺakak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u …ĺaŇč…¨~…ģawaj- ¶…ôntaŇč ato~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u kiiŇč ¶iŇčra. …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** safaw fa…ĺo~u ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan i, pata…ĺo~uma ° to~u ¶i a…ĺisanta fant…ôr p…ôj…ĺo~un , safaw siwa ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan nira ma…ĺamama ° to~u. ¶i po~u…ĺi ¶it…ôr p…ôj…ô…ĺaj ko~u fafańßi nira, nai ****-**** mińß…ô ¶a ** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u ka …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ naŇčra, nikao~urira, itini to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a ma…ĺa…ĺiko~uŇč ¶aŇčra, tato~usa ko~u fa °inajan a wawa naŇčra. itija sato~u i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka safaw to~usa a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, pata…ĺo~uma ° ńß…ô ¶a to~u to~uja wi…¨~…ģaŇč nira ¶i to~uris s…ômitaw…ôr , itini to~u i wij…ôna ato~u kan…ôjtar ko~u aro~u ° naŇčra. pa…ĺatam…¨~…ģaw ** itini i **** mińß…ô ¶a, o~uja niti…ĺi…¨~…ģan mikikiwan nira a ki ¶a ¶i ato~u ja o~uno~u so~uws…ô nira a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ńßananaj ńßawi, paka…ĺajap to~u sakakaaj tata °akaj a ŇčaŇčan to~u ńßakasi/po~us…ô . i **** mińß…ô ¶a itira i jinspo~u…ĺo~u~uko~u taikako~u~u a ma…ĺa ¶ijawso~u(siŇčsi)nipasifa ° to~u sapi…ĺi °…ôtan a ki ¶ai. mikapo~ut to~u si…ô ¶i** nai t…ôno~ukaj no~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a taŇč…ôsa i iko~ur no~u**** a mińß…ô ¶a, ¶i a…ĺisanta fant…ôr p…ôj…ĺo~un mikapo~utaj to~u sijakaj-finaw…ĺan ¶…ôntaŇč no~u awti…ĺi , nikao~urira, mafa…ĺi ¶ to~u ko~u ńßar…ôt…ôŇč pasajra i mi…¨~…ģipo~utaj to~u sa…ĺawa ¶an …ĺaj…ĺaj a ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak niŇčra. k…ôri…¨~…ģ…ôn no~uja pakafanaan nira a miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj ¶i pitiro~u pi…ĺ…ô ¶ a miko~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~unini kaŇč…¨~…ģawaj- ¶…ôntaŇč , o~u kańßatini kafa…ĺi ¶ to~una …¨~…ģ…ômak i, mati…ĺi…¨~…ģ itini to~u misa…ĺo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ niŇčra. pito~uo~uran ** kapańß ńßo~u ¶i a…ĺisanta fant…ôr p…ôj…ĺo~un , mi…ĺijas to~u fo~uko~uiŇč-kiwkaj pakajni to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u po~uksi ira ko~u ¶aaj ka pakaso~u Ē…ĺin to~u kawas, nikao~urira, pakaso~u Ē…ĺin to~u"rato~uńß an ¶a o~u mapo~u…ĺo~usi"(b~b~vo~uts ¶ńßaft o~u…¨~…ģ…ôr b~visio~un) ¶iŇčra, sańßarat…ôrat…ôŇč ńßan nira i, o~u nini ko~u ta…¨~…ģaso~u Ē…ĺinaj/fa Ē…ĺo~uńßaj a katat…ô…ĺ…ôkan a pito~uo~uran. o~urasaka itini to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a mipawa ¶aj to~u pito~uo~uran niŇčra, mi…ĺijaw to~u a mikapo~ut to~una fo~uko~uiŇč-kiwkaj no~u ak…ôs…ôpo~uw . b~van …¨~…ģ…ôr b~b~v…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ôn, a…ĺ…ôxan…¨~…ģ…ôr (** apri…ĺ ****). "b~van …¨~…ģ…ôr b~b~v…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ôn wi…ô…¨~…ģ…ôr in …ôb~vaŇč…ô…ĺis ¶ńß…ô kir ¶ńß…ô …ôiŇč…ôtr…ôt…ôn" . …¨~…ģ…ôr stan…¨~…ģar…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Alexander Van der Bellen Aliksanta Fantipilon I 1944 miheca saka 1 folad saka 18 a romi'ad sofocen ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon, malamikomoday a tamdaw. I 2016 miheca saka 12 folad saka 4 romi'ad miliyaw a misinkiw to congtong ko Awtili, itira i sakacecay royad a mitopa pakaala to 54% to satopa maala malacontong no Awtili. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Austria anini i ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon, patirengan a romi'ad i 2017 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 26 a romi'ad. 1 2020 miheca saka 5 folad saka 24 romi'ad misalafii a mili'epah ato widang i kakomaenan i maci, mico'isay to sapi'ading to lifong to rikec, orasaka,macepet no tayhin. √Ėsterreich: Van der Bellen wird Bundespr√§sident. Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung. Van der Bellen gewinnt die Wahl. Wiener Zeitung. (2016-12-04). (ŚéüŚßčŚÖßŚģĻŚ≠ėś™ĒśĖľ2017-03-05). laloma'an Śģ∂Śļ≠ Pinaro no loma' ni Alisanta Fanter Peylon , O teloc no Sarawa'an no Rosiya , iraay ho ko no Horan a kasarocorocok no 'ilang1944 miheca saka 1 folad saka 18 romi'ad itini i Wiyiena no Awtili ko kahofoc ningra. I 1994 a miheca tangasa i 2012 a miheca, o miocoran no Langdaway-Centang a malakiing no Finawlan-Pikaikiaan no Kitakit . Malakakeridan no Langdaway-Centang ato citodongay to demak no kiing cingra. lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Safaw falo ko mihecaan i, pataloma' to ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon , safaw siwa ko mihecaan nira malamama' to. Ci Policiter Peyelay ko fafahi nira, nai 1943-2018 miheca 50 a mihecaan ko ka lalamod nangra, nikaorira, itini to 2015 a miheca malalikong cangra, tatosa ko fa'inayan a wawa nangra. Itiya sato i 2015 miheca saka safaw tosa a folad, pataloma' heca to toya widang nira ci Toris Semitawer , itini to i Wiyena ato Kaneytar ko aro' nangra. palatamdaw śēôŤā≤ Itini i 1966 miheca, oya nitilidan mikikiwan nira a kicaci ato ya ono sowse nira a tilid hananay hawi, pakalayap to sakakaay tata'akay a ngangan to Hakasi/Pose . I 1970 miheca itira i Yinspoluko Taikaku a malaciyawso(singsi)nipasifa' to sapili'etan a kicai. mikapot to sieciśĒŅś≤Ľ Nai tenokay no 1970 a miheca tangesa i ikor no1980 a miheca, ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon mikapotay to Siyakay-Finawlan Centang no Awtili , nikaorira, mafalic to ko hareteng pasayra i midipotay to salawacan laylay a ko demak ningra. Keriden noya pakafanaan nira a mitiliday ci Pitiro Pilec a mikomod tonini kangdaway-Centang , o kahatini kafalic tona demak i, matilid itini to misalolongan a tilid ningra. pitooran Śģóśēô Kapah ho ci Alisanta Fanter Peylon , miliyas to Fokoing-Kiwkay pakayni to sowal no poksi ira ko caay ka pakaso^lin to kawas, Nikaorira, pakaso^lin to"Ratoh anca o Mapolosi"(Botschaft oder Vision) cingra, saharaterateng han nira i, o nini ko tadaso^linay/fa^lohay a katatelekan a pitooran. Orasaka itini to 2019 a miheca mipawacay to pitooran ningra, miliyaw to a mikapot tona Fokoing-Kiwkay no Akesepow . Van der Bellen, Alexander (30 April 2019). "‚ÄěDie Botschaft des Neuen Testaments ist mir wichtig"". Sonntagsblatt . Archived from the original on 6 July 2019. Retrieved 1 May 2019. "Van der Bellen wieder in Evangelische Kirche eingetreten" . Der Standard.

so~uwa…ĺ no~u po~uksi ira ko~u ¶aaj ka pakaso~u Ē…ĺin to~u kawas, nikao~urira, pakaso~u Ē…ĺin to~u"rato~uńß an ¶a o~u mapo~u…ĺo~usi"(b~b~vo~uts ¶ńßaft o~u…¨~…ģ…ôr b~visio~un) ¶iŇčra, sańßarat…ôrat…ôŇč ńßan nira i, o~u nini ko~u ta…¨~…ģaso~u Ē…ĺinaj/fa Ē…ĺo~uńßaj a katat…ô…ĺ…ôkan a pito~uo~uran. o~urasaka itini to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a mipawa ¶aj to~u pito~uo~uran niŇčra, mi…ĺijaw to~u a mikapo~ut to~una fo~uko~uiŇč-kiwkaj no~u ak…ôs…ôpo~uw . b~van …¨~…ģ…ôr b~b~v…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ôn, a…ĺ…ôxan…¨~…ģ…ôr (** apri…ĺ ****). "*…¨~…ģi…ô b~b~vo~uts ¶ńßaft …¨~…ģ…ôs n…ôo~u~u…ôn t…ôstam…ônts ist mir wi ¶ńßti*"". so~unnta*sb~b~v…ĺatt . ar ¶ńßib~v…ô…¨~…ģ fro~um tńß…ô o~uri*ina…ĺ o~un * *o~u~u…ĺj ****. r…ôtri…ôb~v…ô…¨~…ģ * maj ****. "b~van …¨~…ģ…ôr b~b~v…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ôn wi…ô…¨~…ģ…ôr in …ôb~vaŇč…ô…ĺis ¶ńß…ô kir ¶ńß…ô …ôiŇč…ôtr…ôt…ôn" . …¨~…ģ…ôr stan…¨~…ģar…¨~…ģ.
